name: Hezbollah
summary: Day 63 Thursday. KINETIC ONGOING — IDF CONTINUED STRIKES BEQAA + SOUTHERN LEBANON APR 27-29; HEZBOLLAH ROCKET/DRONE ATTACKS CONTINUE; NO NEW ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER SINCE APR 28 DEFENSE-MINISTRY CONTRACTOR DEATH. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks (Al Jazeera). Israel operating in security zone south of Litani, north of Litani, in Beqaa Valley, and northern Lebanon (Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon War timeline; SBS News Apr 29; Haaretz). The 14-day Hezbollah-Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger remains at Day 5 of 14 (closes 2026-05-11). Per intel.md A9: this UNCHANGED node gets one-line reference in brief, not full paragraph. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): A civilian contractor working for Israel's Defense Ministry was killed Tuesday April 28 by a Hezbollah drone explosion in southern Lebanon; his 19-year-old son lightly injured (CONFIRMED — Haaretz Israel-security desk, Times of Israel, UPI). The contractors were working on demolition of buildings in southern Lebanese villages on behalf of an Israeli civilian company contracted by the Defense Ministry. CRITICAL CLASSIFICATION: does this trigger the 'Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty' 14-day trigger? STRICT INTERPRETATION NO — contractor was Israeli-employed civilian in active operational duty inside Lebanese territory, materially analogous to a non-uniformed combatant; he is NOT a civilian struck inside Israel proper, which is the scenario the trigger was designed to capture (intent: flag VIX-spike-eligible escalation extending Lebanon front into Israel-civilian-targeting territory). [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11)

recent_signals.headline: KINETIC DAY 2 — IDF STRUCK 20+ HEZBOLLAH-LINKED SITES MONDAY; CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER STILL OPEN

historical_summaries.summary: 5 signals. Hezbollah launched strikes on Israel in response to Khamenei's killing | Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon in response | Nearly 1,000 dead in Lebanon from 2 weeks of fighting

29 signals. Israel killed Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem — commander of Hezbollah's southern front — in Beirut airstrike on April 1 | Israel struck Lebanon April 1, coinciding with Trump's primetime address | CLAIMED (Hezbollah): Fired cruise missile at Israeli warship at midnight April 6, 68 nautical miles off Lebanese coast
